name: Seven-up Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the lemon supreme cake mix and instant pineapple pudding into a large mixing bowl.
2. Add oil and eggs to the bowl. Beat until well combined.
3. Pour in the 7-Up and mix until fully blended.
4. Transfer the batter to a greased and floured sheet cake pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until done.
6. While the cake is still warm, spread the icing over it.
7. In a separate bowl, cook the margarine, sugar, pineapple, flour, and eggs until thickened.
8. Add the coconut to the mixture and blend well.
9. Spread the remaining icing over the warm cake while both are still hot.
